name: add_option_to_watchlist
description: Add option contracts to the user's options watchlist. Works for both equity options (AAPL, NVDA) and index options (SPX, NDX, RUT). Source option_ids from get_option_instruments. Confirm with the user before calling — this is a real write.

option_ids.description: Option contract UUIDs to add. Each becomes a single-leg position on the user's options watchlist. Source from get_option_instruments.

position_type.description: "long" (default) or "short". Applies to every option_id in this call. For mixed long/short adds, issue two calls.
